result.stdout:
USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-airtable [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    bases                                    List all accessible bases          
    distinct <baseId> <table> <field>        Unique values with counts from a   
                                             field                              
    docs                                     Output full tool specification in  
                                             YAML                               
    export <baseId> <table> <destination>    Export all records and attachments 
                                             from a table to a local folder     
    fields <baseId> <table>                  Detailed field info for a table    
    record <baseId> <table> <recordId>       Get a single record by ID          
    records <baseId> <table>                 Read records from a table with     
                                             pagination                         
    schema <baseId>                          Full schema of a base (tables,     
                                             fields, views)                     
    search <baseId> <table> <formula>        Filter records using an Airtable   
                                             formula                            
    stats <baseId> <table>                   Table overview with field types and
                                             record count

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Unique values with counts from a field

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-airtable distinct <baseId> <table> <field> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <baseId>    Base ID (e.g. appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)     
    <table>     Table name or ID                     
    <field>     Field name to get distinct values for

OPTIONS:
                    DEFAULT                                     
    -h, --help                 Prints help information          
        --limit                Maximum distinct values to return
        --offset    0          Number of values to skip

commands.payload:

OPTIONS:

    -h, --help                 Prints help information          
        --limit                Maximum distinct values to return
        --offset    0          Number of values to skip

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Export all records and attachments from a table to a local folder

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-airtable export <baseId> <table> <destination> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <baseId>         Base ID (e.g. appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)    
    <table>          Table name or ID                    
    <destination>    Destination folder for exported data

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help      Prints help information                  
        --view      View name or ID to export from           
        --fields    Comma-separated list of fields to include

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Export all records and attachments from a table to a local folder

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-airtable export <baseId> <table> <destination> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <baseId>         Base ID (e.g. appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)    
    <table>          Table name or ID                    
    <destination>    Destination folder for exported data

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help      Prints help information                  
        --view      View name or ID to export from           
        --fields    Comma-separated list of fields to include

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Get a single record by ID

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-airtable record <baseId> <table> <recordId> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <baseId>      Base ID (e.g. appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)  
    <table>       Table name or ID                  
    <recordId>    Record ID (e.g. recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

commands.payload:

    <table>       Table name or ID                  
    <recordId>    Record ID (e.g. recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Read records from a table with pagination

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-airtable records <baseId> <table> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <baseId>    Base ID (e.g. appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)
    <table>     Table name or ID                

OPTIONS:
                       DEFAULT                                             
    -h, --help                    Prints help information                  
        --limit        100        Maximum number of records to return      
        --fields                  Comma-separated list of fields to include
        --sort                    Field name to sort by                    
        --direction    asc        Sort direction (asc or desc)             
        --view                    View name or ID

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:

        --limit        100        Maximum number of records to return      
        --fields                  Comma-separated list of fields to include
        --sort                    Field name to sort by                    
        --direction    asc        Sort direction (asc or desc)             
        --view                    View name or ID

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Full schema of a base (tables, fields, views)

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-airtable schema <baseId> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <baseId>    Base ID (e.g. appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help     Prints help information
        --table    Filter by table name

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Filter records using an Airtable formula

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-airtable search <baseId> <table> <formula> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <baseId>     Base ID (e.g. appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)         
    <table>      Table name or ID                         
    <formula>    Airtable formula (e.g. "{Status}='Done'")

OPTIONS:
                       DEFAULT                                             
    -h, --help                    Prints help information                  
        --limit        100        Maximum number of records to return      
        --fields                  Comma-separated list of fields to include
        --sort                    Field name to sort by                    
        --direction    asc        Sort direction (asc or desc)

commands.payload:

        --limit        100        Maximum number of records to return

        --sort                    Field name to sort by                    
        --direction    asc        Sort direction (asc or desc)
